# usbip

```go
import "github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/internal/usbip"
```

Package usbip implements the USB/IP wire protocol encoding, decoding, and operation codes for device list and import requests.

## Constants

<a name="OPReqDevList"></a>USB/IP operation codes and protocol constants.

```go
const (
    OPReqDevList uint16 = 0x8005
    OPRepDevList uint16 = 0x0005
    OPReqImport  uint16 = 0x8003
    OPRepImport  uint16 = 0x0003

    USBIPCmdSubmit uint32 = 0x0001
    USBIPRetSubmit uint32 = 0x0003

    // USBIPVersion is the standard protocol version header.
    USBIPVersion uint16 = 0x0111
)
```

<a name="Connect"></a>
## func [Connect](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/client.go#L16>)

```go
func Connect(ctx context.Context, addr string) error
```

Connect negotiates an import session with a USB/IP server. Used by the connection controller to establish cross\-node USB device access.

Intent: Provide a single entrypoint for device list retrieval from a remote server. Inputs: Context for cancellation and server address. Outputs: Nil on success. Errors: Returns connection or protocol errors.

<a name="Serve"></a>
## func [Serve](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/server.go#L25>)

```go
func Serve(ctx context.Context, addr string) error
```

Serve starts the USB/IP export serving loop on the given bind address.

Intent: Provide a stable interface for export daemon lifecycle. Inputs: Context for cancellation, bind address, and optional device provider. Outputs: Returns when context is cancelled or an error occurs. Errors: Returns listener or connection handling errors.

<a name="ServeWithProvider"></a>
## func [ServeWithProvider](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/server.go#L30>)

```go
func ServeWithProvider(ctx context.Context, addr string, provider DeviceProvider) error
```

ServeWithProvider starts a USB/IP server with a custom device provider.

<a name="BasicHeader"></a>
## type [BasicHeader](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/protocol.go#L28-L32>)

BasicHeader mirrors the USB/IP operation header in big\-endian encoding. It prefixes every USB/IP protocol message and identifies the operation type \(DevList, Import\) along with the protocol version \(0x0111\).

```go
type BasicHeader struct {
    Version uint16
    Code    uint16
    Status  uint32
}
```


<a name="DevListResponse"></a>
## type [DevListResponse](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/protocol.go#L54-L57>)

DevListResponse represents a device list response with device info.

```go
type DevListResponse struct {
    Header  BasicHeader
    Devices []DeviceInfo
}
```

<a name="DeviceInfo"></a>
## type [DeviceInfo](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/protocol.go#L60-L67>)

DeviceInfo describes a single exported USB device.

```go
type DeviceInfo struct {
    BusID     [32]byte
    BusNum    uint32
    DevNum    uint32
    Speed     uint32
    VendorID  uint16
    ProductID uint16
}
```

<a name="ListRemoteDevices"></a>
### func [ListRemoteDevices](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/client.go#L28>)

```go
func ListRemoteDevices(ctx context.Context, addr string) ([]DeviceInfo, error)
```

ListRemoteDevices connects to a USB/IP server and retrieves the exported device list. Called during health monitoring to verify remote device availability.

Intent: Fetch available USB devices from a remote node's USB/IP export daemon. Inputs: Context for cancellation and server address \(host:port\). Outputs: Slice of DeviceInfo describing exported devices. Errors: Returns dial, encode, or decode errors.

<a name="DeviceProvider"></a>
## type [DeviceProvider](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/server.go#L14-L17>)

DeviceProvider supplies the list of exported devices. Implementations feed the USB/IP server with discoverable hardware. The agent's discovery loop provides the concrete implementation.

```go
type DeviceProvider interface {
    ListDevices() []DeviceInfo
    GetDevice(busID string) (*DeviceInfo, bool)
}
```

## type [ImportRequest](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/protocol.go#L114-L117>)

ImportRequest creates an import request for a specific bus ID.

```go
type ImportRequest struct {
    Header BasicHeader
    BusID  [32]byte
}
```

<a name="ImportResponse"></a>
## type [ImportResponse](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/protocol.go#L156-L164>)

ImportResponse represents the response to an import request.

```go
type ImportResponse struct {
    Header    BasicHeader
    BusID     [32]byte
    BusNum    uint32
    DevNum    uint32
    Speed     uint32
    VendorID  uint16
    ProductID uint16
}
```


<a name="ImportDevice"></a>
### func [ImportDevice](<https://github.com/grethel-labs/kubelink-usb/blob/main/internal/usbip/client.go#L56>)

```go
func ImportDevice(ctx context.Context, addr, busID string) (*ImportResponse, error)
```

ImportDevice connects to a USB/IP server and imports a specific device by bus ID. Called by the connection controller after approval to bind a remote device locally.

Intent: Attach a remote USB device so the local node can use it. Inputs: Context, server address, and the bus ID of the device to import. Outputs: ImportResponse with device info on success. Errors: Returns dial, protocol, or rejection errors.

```go
func (r *ImportResponse) Encode(w io.Writer) error
```

Encode writes the import response.
